name: aurora-ai-conversation
title: Aurora AI Conversation
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Aurora-native conversation parity surface from AI Elements.
docs:
Aurora block that expects `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-ai-elements`, and `aurora-avatar` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/ai/conversation.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-ai-elements`, `aurora-avatar`.
